verses.latin_vulgate: Hi sunt autem sacerdotes et Levitæ, qui ascenderunt cum Zorobabel filio Salathiel, et Josue : Saraia, Jeremias, Esdras,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֙לֶּה֙ הַכֹּהֲנִ֣ים וְהַלְוִיִּ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָל֛וּ עִם־זְרֻבָּבֶ֥ל בֶּן־שְׁאַלְתִּיאֵ֖ל וְיֵשׁ֑וּעַ שְׂרָיָ֥ה יִרְמְיָ֖ה עֶזְרָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now these are the priests and the Levites, that went up with Zorobabel the son of Salathiel, and Josue: Saraia, Jeremias, Esdras,
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat papit ja Leviläiset, jotka menivät ylös Serubbabelin Sealtielin pojan ja Jesuan kanssa: Seraja, Jeremia, Esra,
verses.king_james: Now these are the priests and the Levites that went up with Zerubbabel the son of Shealtiel, and Jeshua: Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezra,

verses.latin_vulgate: Amaria, Melluch, Hattus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲמַרְיָ֥ה מַלּ֖וּךְ חַטּֽוּשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Amaria, Melluch, Hattus,
verses.finnish_biblia: Amaria, Malluk, Hattus,
verses.king_james: Amariah, Malluch, Hattush,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sebenias, Rheum, Merimuth,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁכַנְיָ֥ה רְחֻ֖ם מְרֵמֹֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sebenias, Rheum, Merimuth,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sekania, Rehum, Meremot,
verses.king_james: Shechaniah, Rehum, Meremoth,

verses.latin_vulgate: Addo, Genthon, Abia,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִדּ֥וֹא גִנְּת֖וֹי אֲבִיָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Addo, Genthon, Abia,
verses.finnish_biblia: Iddo, Ginetoi, Abia,
verses.king_james: Iddo, Ginnetho, Abijah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Miamin, Madia, Belga,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִיָּמִ֥ין מַֽעַדְיָ֖ה בִּלְגָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Miamin, Madia, Belga,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mijamin, Maadia, Bilga,
verses.king_james: Miamin, Maadiah, Bilgah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Semeia, et Jojarib, Idaia, Sellum, Amoc, Helcias,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁמַֽעְיָ֥ה וְיוֹיָרִ֖יב יְדַֽעְיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Semeia, and Joiarib, Idaia, Sellum Amoc, Helcias,
verses.finnish_biblia: Semaja, Jojarib, Jedaja,
verses.king_james: Shemaiah, and Joiarib, Jedaiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Idaia. Isti principes sacerdotum, et fratres eorum in diebus Josue.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סַלּ֣וּ עָמ֔וֹק חִלְקִיָּ֖ה יְדַֽעְיָ֑ה אֵ֣לֶּה רָאשֵׁ֧י הַכֹּהֲנִ֛ים וַאֲחֵיהֶ֖ם בִּימֵ֥י יֵשֽׁוּעַ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Idaia. These were the chief of the priests, and of their brethren in the days of Josue.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sallu, Amok, Hilkia ja Jedaja: nämät olivat pappein ja heidän veljeinsä päämiehet Jesuan aikana.
verses.king_james: Sallu, Amok, Hilkiah, Jedaiah. These were the chief of the priests and of their brethren in the days of Jeshua.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Levitæ, Jesua, Bennui, Cedmihel, Sarebia, Juda, Mathanias, super hymnos ipsi et fratres eorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַלְוִיִּ֗ם יֵשׁ֧וּעַ בִּנּ֛וּי קַדְמִיאֵ֥ל שֵׁרֵבְיָ֖ה יְהוּדָ֣ה מַתַּנְיָ֑ה עַֽל־הֻיְּד֖וֹת ה֥וּא וְאֶחָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Levites, Jesua, Bennui, Cedmihel, Sarebia, Juda, Mathanias, they and their brethren were over the hymns:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Leviläiset: Jesua, Binnui, Kadmiel, Serebia, Juuda ja Mattania kiitosvirtten päällä, hän ja hänen veljensä;
verses.king_james: Moreover the Levites: Jeshua, Binnui, Kadmiel, Sherebiah, Judah, and Mattaniah, which was over the thanksgiving, he and his brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: et Becbecia atque Hanni, et fratres eorum, unusquisque in officio suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבַקְבֻּֽקְיָ֨ה (וענו) [וְעֻנִּ֧י] אֲחֵיהֶ֛ם לְנֶגְדָּ֖ם לְמִשְׁמָרֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Becbecia, and Hanni, and their brethren every one in his office.
verses.finnish_biblia: Bakbukia ja Unni veljinensä olivat vartiana heidän tykönänsä.
verses.king_james: Also Bakbukiah and Unni, their brethren, were over against them in the watches.

verses.latin_vulgate: Josue autem genuit Joacim, et Joacim genuit Eliasib, et Eliasib genuit Jojada,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֵשׁ֖וּעַ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־יֽוֹיָקִ֑ים וְיֽוֹיָקִים֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־אֶלְיָשִׁ֔יב וְאֶלְיָשִׁ֖יב אֶת־יוֹיָדָֽע׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Josue begot Joacim, and Joacim begot Eliasib, and Eliasib begot Joiada,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jesua siitti Jojakimin, Jojakim siitti Eljasibin, Eljasib siitti Jojadan,
verses.king_james: And Jeshua begat Joiakim, Joiakim also begat Eliashib, and Eliashib begat Joiada,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jojada genuit Jonathan, et Jonathan genuit Jeddoa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיוֹיָדָע֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־יוֹנָתָ֔ן וְיוֹנָתָ֖ן הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־יַדּֽוּעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joiada begot Jonathan and Jonathan begot Jeddoa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jojada siitti Jonatanin, Jonatan siitti Jadduan.
verses.king_james: And Joiada begat Jonathan, and Jonathan begat Jaddua.

verses.latin_vulgate: In diebus autem Joacim erant sacerdotes et principes familiarum : Saraiæ, Maraia : Jeremiæ, Hanania :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבִימֵי֙ יֽוֹיָקִ֔ים הָי֥וּ כֹהֲנִ֖ים רָאשֵׁ֣י הָאָב֑וֹת לִשְׂרָיָ֣ה מְרָיָ֔ה לְיִרְמְיָ֖ה חֲנַנְיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in the days of Joacim the priests and heads of the families were: Of Saraia, Maraia: of Jeremias, Hanania:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jojakimin aikana olivat nämät ylimmäiset isät pappein seassa: Serajasta Meraja, Jeremiasta Hanania,
verses.king_james: And in the days of Joiakim were priests, the chief of the fathers: of Seraiah, Meraiah; of Jeremiah, Hananiah;

verses.latin_vulgate: Esdræ, Mosollam : Amariæ, Johanan :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְעֶזְרָ֣א מְשֻׁלָּ֔ם לַאֲמַרְיָ֖ה יְהוֹחָנָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Esdras, Mosollam: and of Amaria, Johanan:
verses.finnish_biblia: Esrasta oli Mesullam, Amariasta Johanan,
verses.king_james: Of Ezra, Meshullam; of Amariah, Jehohanan;

verses.latin_vulgate: Milicho, Jonathan : Sebeniæ, Joseph :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (למלוכי) [לִמְלִ֙יכוּ֙] יֽוֹנָתָ֔ן לִשְׁבַנְיָ֖ה יוֹסֵֽף׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Milicho, Jonathan: of Sebenia, Joseph:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mallukista Jonatan, Sebaniasta Joseph,
verses.king_james: Of Melicu, Jonathan; of Shebaniah, Joseph;

verses.latin_vulgate: Haram, Edna : Maraioth, Helci :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְחָרִ֣ם עַדְנָ֔א לִמְרָי֖וֹת חֶלְקָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Haram, Edna: of Maraioth, Helci:
verses.finnish_biblia: Harimista Adna, Merajotista Helkai,
verses.king_james: Of Harim, Adna; of Meraioth, Helkai;

verses.latin_vulgate: Adaiæ, Zacharia : Genthon, Mosollam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (לעדיא) [לְעִדּ֥וֹא] זְכַרְיָ֖ה לְגִנְּת֥וֹן מְשֻׁלָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Adaia, Zacharia: of Genthon, Mosollam:
verses.finnish_biblia: Iddosta Sakaria, Ginthonista Mesullam,
verses.king_james: Of Iddo, Zechariah; of Ginnethon, Meshullam;

verses.latin_vulgate: Abiæ, Zechri : Miamin et Moadiæ, Phelti :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַאֲבִיָּ֖ה זִכְרִ֑י לְמִ֨נְיָמִ֔ין לְמוֹעַדְיָ֖ה פִּלְטָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Abia, Zechri: of Miamin and Moadia, Phelti:
verses.finnish_biblia: Abiasta Sikri, Minjaminista ja Moadiasta Piltai,
verses.king_james: Of Abijah, Zichri; of Miniamin, of Moadiah, Piltai;

verses.latin_vulgate: Belgæ, Sammua : Semaiæ, Jonathan :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְבִלְגָּ֣ה שַׁמּ֔וּעַ לִֽשְׁמַעְיָ֖ה יְהוֹנָתָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Belga, Sammua of Semaia, Jonathan:
verses.finnish_biblia: Bilgasta Sammua, Semajasta Jonatan,
verses.king_james: Of Bilgah, Shammua; of Shemaiah, Jehonathan;

verses.latin_vulgate: Jojarib, Mathanai : Jodaiæ, Azzi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְיוֹיָרִ֣יב מַתְּנַ֔י לִֽידַֽעְיָ֖ה עֻזִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Joiarib, Mathanai: of Jodaia, Azzi:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jojaribista Matnai, Jedajasta Ussi,
verses.king_james: And of Joiarib, Mattenai; of Jedaiah, Uzzi;

verses.latin_vulgate: Sellai, Celai : Amoc, Heber :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְסַלַּ֥י קַלָּ֖י לְעָמ֥וֹק עֵֽבֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Sellai, Celai: of Amoc, Heber:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sallaista Kallai, Amakista Eber,
verses.king_james: Of Sallai, Kallai; of Amok, Eber;

verses.latin_vulgate: Helciæ, Hasebia : Idaiæ, Nathanaël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְחִלְקִיָּ֣ה חֲשַׁבְיָ֔ה לִֽידַֽעְיָ֖ה נְתַנְאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Helcias, Hasebia: of Idaia, Nathanael.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hilkiasta Hasabia, Jedajasta Natanael.
verses.king_james: Of Hilkiah, Hashabiah; of Jedaiah, Nethaneel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Levitæ in diebus Eliasib, et Jojada, et Johanan, et Jeddoa, scripti principes familiarum, et sacerdotes in regno Darii Persæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַלְוִיִּם֩ בִּימֵ֨י אֶלְיָשִׁ֜יב יוֹיָדָ֤ע וְיוֹחָנָן֙ וְיַדּ֔וּעַ כְּתוּבִ֖ים רָאשֵׁ֣י אָב֑וֹת וְהַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים עַל־מַלְכ֖וּת דָּרְיָ֥וֶשׁ הַפָּֽרְסִֽי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The Levites the chiefs of the families in the days of Eliasib, and Joiada, and Johanan, and Jeddoa, were recorded, and the priests in the reign of Darius the Persian.
verses.finnish_biblia: Leviläiset Eljasibin, Jojadan, Johanan ja Jadduan aikana, kirjoitetut isäin päämiehet; niin myös papit, Dariuksen Persialaisen valtakuntaan asti.
verses.king_james: The Levites in the days of Eliashib, Joiada, and Johanan, and Jaddua, were recorded chief of the fathers: also the priests, to the reign of Darius the Persian.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Levi principes familiarum, scripti in libro verborum dierum, et usque ad dies Jonathan, filii Eliasib.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֤י לֵוִי֙ רָאשֵׁ֣י הָֽאָב֔וֹת כְּתוּבִ֕ים עַל־סֵ֖פֶר דִּבְרֵ֣י הַיָּמִ֑ים וְעַד־יְמֵ֖י יֽוֹחָנָ֥ן בֶּן־אֶלְיָשִֽׁיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Levi, heads of the families were written in the book of Chronicles, even unto the days of Jonathan the son of Eliasib.
verses.finnish_biblia: Levin lapset, ylimmäiset isät, ovat kirjoitetut Aikakirjaan, Johananin Eljasibin pojan aikaan asti.
verses.king_james: The sons of Levi, the chief of the fathers, were written in the book of the chronicles, even until the days of Johanan the son of Eliashib.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et principes Levitarum, Hasebia, Serebia, et Josue filius Cedmihel : et fratres eorum per vices suas, ut laudarent et confiterentur juxta præceptum David viri Dei, et observarent æque per ordinem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָאשֵׁ֣י הַ֠לְוִיִּ֠ם חֲשַׁבְיָ֨ה שֵֽׁרֵבְיָ֜ה וְיֵשׁ֤וּעַ בֶּן־קַדְמִיאֵל֙ וַאֲחֵיהֶ֣ם לְנֶגְדָּ֔ם לְהַלֵּ֣ל לְהוֹד֔וֹת בְּמִצְוַ֖ת דָּוִ֣יד אִישׁ־הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים מִשְׁמָ֖ר לְעֻמַּ֥ת מִשְׁמָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the chief of the Levites were Hasebia, Serebia, and Josue the son of Cedmihel: and their brethren by their courses, to praise and to give thanks according to the commandment of David the man of God, and to wait equally in order.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Leviläisten päämiehet: Hasabia, Serebia ja Jesua Kadmielin poika, ja heidän veljensä heidän vieressänsä, ylistämässä ja kiittämässä, niinkuin David Jumalan mies oli käskenyt, yksi vartia toisen kohdalla.
verses.king_james: And the chief of the Levites: Hashabiah, Sherebiah, and Jeshua the son of Kadmiel, with their brethren over against them, to praise and to give thanks, according to the commandment of David the man of God, ward over against ward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mathania, et Becbecia, Obedia, Mosollam, Telmon, Accub, custodes portarum et vestibulorum ante portas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַתַּנְיָ֧ה וּבַקְבֻּֽקְיָ֛ה עֹבַדְיָ֥ה מְשֻׁלָּ֖ם טַלְמ֣וֹן עַקּ֑וּב שֹׁמְרִ֤ים שֽׁוֹעֲרִים֙ מִשְׁמָ֔ר בַּאֲסֻפֵּ֖י הַשְּׁעָרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Mathania, and Becbecia, Obedia, and Mosollam, Telmon, Accub, were keepers of the gates and of the entrances before the gates.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mattania, Bakbukia, Obadia, Mesullam, Talmon ja Akkub olivat ovenvartiat, tavaraporttein vartioitsemisessa.
verses.king_james: Mattaniah, and Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon, Akkub, were porters keeping the ward at the thresholds of the gates.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi in diebus Joacim filii Josue, filii Josedec, et in diebus Nehemiæ ducis, et Esdræ sacerdotis scribæque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֕לֶּה בִּימֵ֛י יוֹיָקִ֥ים בֶּן־יֵשׁ֖וּעַ בֶּן־יוֹצָדָ֑ק וּבִימֵי֙ נְחֶמְיָ֣ה הַפֶּחָ֔ה וְעֶזְרָ֥א הַכֹּהֵ֖ן הַסּוֹפֵֽר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: These were in the days of Joacim the son of Josue, the son of Josedec, and in the days of Nehemiah the governor, and of Esdras the priest and scribe.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät olivat Jojakimin Jesuan pojan Jotsadakin pojan aikana, ja Nehemian maanvanhimman, ja Esran papin, kirjanoppineen, aikana.
verses.king_james: These were in the days of Joiakim the son of Jeshua, the son of Jozadak, and in the days of Nehemiah the governor, and of Ezra the priest, the scribe.

verses.latin_vulgate: In dedicatione autem muri Jerusalem, requisierunt Levitas de omnibus locis suis ut adducerent eos in Jerusalem, et facerent dedicationem et lætitiam in actione gratiarum, et cantico, et in cymbalis, psalteriis, et citharis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבַחֲנֻכַּ֞ת חוֹמַ֣ת יְרוּשָׁלַ֗͏ִם בִּקְשׁ֤וּ אֶת־הַלְוִיִּם֙ מִכׇּל־מְק֣וֹמֹתָ֔ם לַהֲבִיאָ֖ם לִֽירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם לַעֲשֹׂ֨ת חֲנֻכָּ֤ה וְשִׂמְחָה֙ וּבְתוֹד֣וֹת וּבְשִׁ֔יר מְצִלְתַּ֖יִם נְבָלִ֥ים וּבְכִנֹּרֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And at the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem they sought the Levites out of all their places, to bring them to Jerusalem, and to keep the dedication, and to rejoice with thanksgiving, and with singing, and with cymbals, and psalteries and harps.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jerusalemin muurin vihkimiselle etsivät he Leviläisiä kaikista heidän paikoistansa, tuodaksensa heitä Jerusalemiin pitämään vihkimistä ilolla, kiitoksella, virsillä, symbaleilla, psalmeilla ja harpuilla.
verses.king_james: And at the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem they sought the Levites out of all their places, to bring them to Jerusalem, to keep the dedication with gladness, both with thanksgivings, and with singing, with cymbals, psalteries, and with harps.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregati sunt autem filii cantorum de campestribus circa Jerusalem, et de villis Nethuphathi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּאָ֣סְפ֔וּ בְּנֵ֖י הַמְשֹׁרְרִ֑ים וּמִן־הַכִּכָּר֙ סְבִיב֣וֹת יְרוּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם וּמִן־חַצְרֵ֖י נְטֹפָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of the singing men were gathered together out of the plain country about Jerusalem, and out of the villages of Nethuphati,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja veisaajain lapset tulivat kokoon Jerusalemin ympäristöltä ja Netophatin kylistä,
verses.king_james: And the sons of the singers gathered themselves together, both out of the plain country round about Jerusalem, and from the villages of Netophathi;

verses.latin_vulgate: et de domo Galgal, et de regionibus Geba et Azmaveth : quoniam villas ædificaverunt sibi cantores in circuitu Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבֵּית֙ הַגִּלְגָּ֔ל וּמִשְּׂד֥וֹת גֶּ֖בַע וְעַזְמָ֑וֶת כִּ֣י חֲצֵרִ֗ים בָּנ֤וּ לָהֶם֙ הַמְשֹׁ֣רְרִ֔ים סְבִיב֖וֹת יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And from the house of Galgal, and from the countries of Geba and Azmaveth: for the singing men had built themselves villages round about Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Gilgalin huoneesta, ja Gibean ja Asmavetin pelloilta; sillä veisaajat olivat rakentaneet itsellensä taloja Jerusalemin ympärillä.
verses.king_james: Also from the house of Gilgal, and out of the fields of Geba and Azmaveth: for the singers had builded them villages round about Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mundati sunt sacerdotes et Levitæ, et mundaverunt populum, et portas, et murum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽטַּהֲר֔וּ הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים וְהַלְוִיִּ֑ם וַֽיְטַהֲרוּ֙ אֶת־הָעָ֔ם וְאֶת־הַשְּׁעָרִ֖ים וְאֶת־הַחוֹמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priests and the Levites were purified, and they purified the people, and the gates, and the wall.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papit ja Leviläiset puhdistivat itsensä: he puhdistivat myös kansan ja portit ja muurit.
verses.king_james: And the priests and the Levites purified themselves, and purified the people, and the gates, and the wall.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendere autem feci principes Juda super murum, et statui duos magnos choros laudantium. Et ierunt ad dexteram super murum ad portam sterquilinii.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאַעֲלֶה֙ אֶת־שָׂרֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֔ה מֵעַ֖ל לַחוֹמָ֑ה וָאַעֲמִ֡ידָה שְׁתֵּ֣י תוֹדֹת֩ גְּדוֹלֹ֨ת וְתַהֲלֻכֹ֤ת לַיָּמִין֙ מֵעַ֣ל לַחוֹמָ֔ה לְשַׁ֖עַר הָאַשְׁפֹּֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I made the princes of Juda go up upon the wall, and I appointed two great choirs to give praise. And they went on the right hand upon the wall toward the dung gate.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä annoin Juudan päämiehet mennä ylös muurille, ja asetin kaksi suurta laulukuntaa ja juhlasaattoa muurin päälle: (yhden) oikialle puolelle Sontaporttia.
verses.king_james: Then I brought up the princes of Judah upon the wall, and appointed two great companies of them that gave thanks, whereof one went on the right hand upon the wall toward the dung gate:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ivit post eos Osaias, et media pars principum Juda,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֤לֶךְ אַחֲרֵיהֶם֙ הוֹשַׁ֣עְיָ֔ה וַחֲצִ֖י שָׂרֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after them went Osaias, and half of the princes of Juda,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hosaja ja toinen puoli Juudan päämiehistä kävivät heidän perässänsä,
verses.king_james: And after them went Hoshaiah, and half of the princes of Judah,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Azarias, Esdras, et Mosollam, Judas, et Benjamin, et Semeia, et Jeremias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲזַרְיָ֥ה עֶזְרָ֖א וּמְשֻׁלָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Azarias, Esdras, and Mosollam, Judas, and Benjamin, and Semeia, and Jeremias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asaria, Esra, Mesullam,
verses.king_james: And Azariah, Ezra, and Meshullam,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis sacerdotum in tubis, Zacharias filius Jonathan, filius Semeiæ, filius Mathaniæ, filius Michaiæ, filius Zechur, filius Asaph,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהוּדָה֙ וּבִנְיָמִ֔ן וּֽשְׁמַֽעְיָ֖ה וְיִרְמְיָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of the priests with trumpets, Zacharias the son of Jonathan, the son of Semeia, the son of Mathania, the son of Michaia, the son of Zechur, the son of Asaph,
verses.finnish_biblia: Juuda, Benjamin, Semaja ja Jeremia,
verses.king_james: Judah, and Benjamin, and Shemaiah, and Jeremiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis sacerdotum in tubis, Zacharias filius Jonathan, filius Semeiæ, filius Mathaniæ, filius Michaiæ, filius Zechur, filius Asaph,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֥י הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים בַּחֲצֹצְר֑וֹת זְכַרְיָ֨ה בֶן־יֽוֹנָתָ֜ן בֶּן־שְׁמַֽעְיָ֗ה בֶּן־מַתַּנְיָה֙ בֶּן־מִ֣יכָיָ֔ה בֶּן־זַכּ֖וּר בֶּן־אָסָֽף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And of the sons of the priests with trumpets, Zacharias the son of Jonathan, the son of Semeia, the son of Mathania, the son of Michaia, the son of Zechur, the son of Asaph,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja muutamat pappein lapsista vaskitorvein kanssa: Sakaria Jonatanin poika, Semajan pojan, Mattanian pojan, Mikajan pojan, Sakkurin pojan, Asaphin pojan;
verses.king_james: And certain of the priests’ sons with trumpets; namely, Zechariah the son of Jonathan, the son of Shemaiah, the son of Mattaniah, the son of Michaiah, the son of Zaccur, the son of Asaph:

verses.latin_vulgate: et fratres ejus Semeia, et Azareel, Malalai, Galalai, Maai, Nathanaël, et Judas, et Hanani, in vasis cantici David viri Dei : et Esdras scriba ante eos in porta fontis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֶחָ֡יו שְֽׁמַעְיָ֡ה וַעֲזַרְאֵ֡ל מִֽלְלַ֡י גִּֽלְלַ֡י מָעַ֞י נְתַנְאֵ֤ל וִֽיהוּדָה֙ חֲנָ֔נִי בִּכְלֵי־שִׁ֥יר דָּוִ֖יד אִ֣ישׁ הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וְעֶזְרָ֥א הַסּוֹפֵ֖ר לִפְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his brethren Semeia, and Azareel, Malalai, Galalai, Maai, Nathanael, and Judas, and Hanani, with the musical instruments of David the man of God: and Esdras the scribe before them at the fountain gate.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen veljensä Semaja, Asareel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Netaneel, Juuda, Hanani, Davidin Jumalan miehen kanteleiden kanssa, ja Esra kirjanoppinut heidän edellänsä.
verses.king_james: And his brethren, Shemaiah, and Azarael, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethaneel, and Judah, Hanani, with the musical instruments of David the man of God, and Ezra the scribe before them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et contra eos ascenderunt in gradibus civitatis David in ascensu muri super domum David, et usque ad portam aquarum ad orientem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל֩ שַׁ֨עַר הָעַ֜יִן וְנֶגְדָּ֗ם עָלוּ֙ עַֽל־מַעֲלוֹת֙ עִ֣יר דָּוִ֔יד בַּֽמַּעֲלֶ֖ה לַחוֹמָ֑ה מֵעַל֙ לְבֵ֣ית דָּוִ֔יד וְעַ֛ד שַׁ֥עַר הַמַּ֖יִם מִזְרָֽח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they went up over against them by the stairs of the city of David, at the going up of the wall of the house of David, and to the water gate eastward:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Lähdeporttia päin menivät he ylös heidän kohdallansa astuimia myöten Davidin kaupunkiin, (ja siitä) astuimilla muurein päälle, Davidin huoneesta Vesiporttiin asti itään päin.
verses.king_james: And at the fountain gate, which was over against them, they went up by the stairs of the city of David, at the going up of the wall, above the house of David, even unto the water gate eastward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et chorus secundus gratias referentium ibat ex adverso, et ego post eum, et media pars populi super murum, et super turrim furnorum, et usque ad murum latissimum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַתּוֹדָ֧ה הַשֵּׁנִ֛ית הַהוֹלֶ֥כֶת לְמ֖וֹאל וַאֲנִ֣י אַחֲרֶ֑יהָ וַחֲצִ֨י הָעָ֜ם מֵעַ֣ל לְהַחוֹמָ֗ה מֵעַל֙ לְמִגְדַּ֣ל הַתַּנּוּרִ֔ים וְעַ֖ד הַחוֹמָ֥ה הָרְחָבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the second choir of them that gave thanks went on the opposite side, and I after them, and the half of the people upon the wall, and upon the tower of the furnaces, even to the broad wall,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja toinen laulukunta kävi vastaan, ja minä sen perässä, ja toinen puoli kansaa muurin päällä, Pätsitornista leviään muuriin saakka,
verses.king_james: And the other company of them that gave thanks went over against them, and I after them, and the half of the people upon the wall, from beyond the tower of the furnaces even unto the broad wall;

verses.latin_vulgate: et super portam Ephraim, et super portam antiquam, et super portam piscium et turrim Hananeel, et turrim Emath, et usque ad portam gregis : et steterunt in porta custodiæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֵעַ֣ל לְשַֽׁעַר־אֶ֠פְרַ֠יִם וְעַל־שַׁ֨עַר הַיְשָׁנָ֜ה וְעַל־שַׁ֣עַר הַדָּגִ֗ים וּמִגְדַּ֤ל חֲנַנְאֵל֙ וּמִגְדַּ֣ל הַמֵּאָ֔ה וְעַ֖ד שַׁ֣עַר הַצֹּ֑אן וְעָ֣מְד֔וּ בְּשַׁ֖עַר הַמַּטָּרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And above the gate of Ephraim, and above the old gate, and above the fish gate and the tower of Hananeel, and the tower of Emath, and even to the flock gate: and they stood still in the watch gate.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ephraimin portista, Vanhan portin ja Kalaportin ja Hananeelin tornin ja Mean tornin ohitse Lammasporttiin asti; ja seisahtivat Vankiportissa.
verses.king_james: And from above the gate of Ephraim, and above the old gate, and above the fish gate, and the tower of Hananeel, and the tower of Meah, even unto the sheep gate: and they stood still in the prison gate.

verses.latin_vulgate: steteruntque duo chori laudantium in domo Dei, et ego, et dimidia pars magistratuum mecum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽתַּעֲמֹ֛דְנָה שְׁתֵּ֥י הַתּוֹדֹ֖ת בְּבֵ֣ית הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וַאֲנִ֕י וַחֲצִ֥י הַסְּגָנִ֖ים עִמִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the two choirs of them that gave praise stood still at the house of God, and I and the half of the magistrates with me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne kaksi kiitoskuoria seisoivat Jumalan huoneessa, ja minä ja toinen puoli ylimmäisiä minun kanssani,
verses.king_james: So stood the two companies of them that gave thanks in the house of God, and I, and the half of the rulers with me:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sacerdotes, Eliachim, Maasia, Miamin, Michea, Elioënai, Zacharia, Hanania in tubis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַכֹּהֲנִ֡ים אֶלְיָקִ֡ים מַעֲשֵׂיָ֡ה מִ֠נְיָמִ֠ין מִיכָיָ֧ה אֶלְיוֹעֵינַ֛י זְכַרְיָ֥ה חֲנַנְיָ֖ה בַּחֲצֹצְרֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priests, Eliachim, Maasia, Miamin, Michea, Elioenai, Zacharia, Hanania with trumpets,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papit Eliakim, Maeseja, Minjamin, Mikaja, Eljoenai, Sakaria, Hanania olivat vaskitorvein kanssa,
verses.king_james: And the priests; Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Michaiah, Elioenai, Zechariah, and Hananiah, with trumpets;

verses.latin_vulgate: et Maasia, et Semeia, et Eleazar, et Azzi, et Johanan, et Melchia, et Ælam, et Ezer. Et clare cecinerunt cantores, et Jezraia præpositus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַעֲשֵׂיָ֨ה וּֽשְׁמַֽעְיָ֜ה וְאֶלְעָזָ֧ר וְעֻזִּ֛י וִֽיהוֹחָנָ֥ן וּמַלְכִּיָּ֖ה וְעֵילָ֣ם וָעָ֑זֶר וַיַּשְׁמִ֙יעוּ֙ הַמְשֹׁ֣רְרִ֔ים וְיִֽזְרַחְיָ֖ה הַפָּקִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Maasia, and Semeia, and Eleazar, and Azzi, and Johanan, and Melchia, and Elam, and Ezer. And the singers sung loud, and Jezraia was their overseer:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Maeseja, Semaja, Eleatsar, Ussi, Johanan, Malkia, Elam ja Asar. Ja veisaajat veisasivat korkiasti, ja Jisrahia oli esimiehenä.
verses.king_james: And Maaseiah, and Shemaiah, and Eleazar, and Uzzi, and Jehohanan, and Malchijah, and Elam, and Ezer. And the singers sang loud, with Jezrahiah their overseer.

verses.latin_vulgate: et immolaverunt in die illa victimas magnas, et lætati sunt : Deus enim lætificaverat eos lætitia magna : sed et uxores eorum et liberi gavisi sunt, et audita est lætitia Jerusalem procul.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּזְבְּח֣וּ בַיּוֹם־הַ֠ה֠וּא זְבָחִ֨ים גְּדוֹלִ֜ים וַיִּשְׂמָ֗חוּ כִּ֤י הָאֱלֹהִים֙ שִׂמְּחָם֙ שִׂמְחָ֣ה גְדוֹלָ֔ה וְגַ֧ם הַנָּשִׁ֛ים וְהַיְלָדִ֖ים שָׂמֵ֑חוּ וַתִּשָּׁמַ֛ע שִׂמְחַ֥ת יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם מֵרָחֽוֹק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they sacrificed on that day great sacrifices, and they rejoiced: for God had made them joyful with great joy: their wives also and their children rejoiced, and the joy of Jerusalem was heard afar off.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he uhrasivat sinä päivänä suuret uhrit, ja olivat iloiset; sillä Jumala oli heitä iloittanut suurella ilolla, että myös vaimot ja lapsetkin iloitsivat, ja Jerusalemin ilo kuului kauvas.
verses.king_james: Also that day they offered great sacrifices, and rejoiced: for God had made them rejoice with great joy: the wives also and the children rejoiced: so that the joy of Jerusalem was heard even afar off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Recensuerunt quoque in die illa viros super gazophylacia thesauri ad libamina, et ad primitias, et ad decimas, ut introferrent per eos principes civitatis in decore gratiarum actionis, sacerdotes et Levitas : quia lætificatus est Juda in sacerdotibus et Levitis adstantibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפָּקְד֣וּ בַיּוֹם֩ הַה֨וּא אֲנָשִׁ֜ים עַל־הַנְּשָׁכ֗וֹת לָא֨וֹצָר֥וֹת לַתְּרוּמוֹת֮ לָרֵאשִׁ֣ית וְלַמַּֽעַשְׂרוֹת֒ לִכְנ֨וֹס בָּהֶ֜ם לִשְׂדֵ֤י הֶעָרִים֙ מְנָא֣וֹת הַתּוֹרָ֔ה לַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים וְלַלְוִיִּ֑ם כִּ֚י שִׂמְחַ֣ת יְהוּדָ֔ה עַל־הַכֹּהֲנִ֥ים וְעַל־הַלְוִיִּ֖ם הָעֹמְדִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: They appointed also in that day men over the storehouses of the treasure, for the libations, and for the firstfruits, and for the tithes, that the rulers of the city might bring them in by them in honour of thanksgiving, for the priests and Levites: for Juda was joyful in the priests and Levites that assisted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siihen aikaan asetettiin miehet tavarakammioin päälle, joissa ylennykset, ensimäiset hedelmät ja kymmenykset olivat, joita heidän piti kokooman kaupunkein pelloista, papeille ja Leviläisille jaettaa lain jälkeen; sillä Juudalaisilla oli ilo papeista ja Leviläisistä, jotka seisoivat.
verses.king_james: And at that time were some appointed over the chambers for the treasures, for the offerings, for the firstfruits, and for the tithes, to gather into them out of the fields of the cities the portions of the law for the priests and Levites: for Judah rejoiced for the priests and for the Levites that waited.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et custodierunt observationem Dei sui, et observationem expiationis, et cantores, et janitores juxta præceptum David, et Salomonis filii ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּשְׁמְר֞וּ מִשְׁמֶ֤רֶת אֱלֹֽהֵיהֶם֙ וּמִשְׁמֶ֣רֶת הַֽטׇּהֳרָ֔ה וְהַמְשֹׁרְרִ֖ים וְהַשֹּׁעֲרִ֑ים כְּמִצְוַ֥ת דָּוִ֖יד שְׁלֹמֹ֥ה בְנֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they kept the watch of their God, and the observance of expiation, and the singing men, and the porters, according to the commandment of David, and of Solomon his son.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he pitivät vaarin Jumalan vartiosta ja puhdistuksen vartiosta, niin myös veisaajista ja ovenvartioista, Davidin ja Salomon hänen poikansa käskyn jälkeen,
verses.king_james: And both the singers and the porters kept the ward of their God, and the ward of the purification, according to the commandment of David, and of Solomon his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia in diebus David et Asaph ab exordio erant principes constituti cantorum in carmine laudantium et confitentium Deo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־בִימֵ֥י דָוִ֛יד וְאָסָ֖ף מִקֶּ֑דֶם (ראש) [רָאשֵׁי֙] הַמְשֹׁ֣רְרִ֔ים וְשִׁיר־תְּהִלָּ֥ה וְהֹד֖וֹת לֵֽאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: For in the days of David and Asaph from the beginning there were chief singers appointed, to praise with canticles, and give thanks to God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Davidin ja Asaphin aikana olivat muinen asetetut ylimmäiset veisaajat, ja kiitosvirret ja kiitokset Jumalalle.
verses.king_james: For in the days of David and Asaph of old there were chief of the singers, and songs of praise and thanksgiving unto God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omnis Israël in diebus Zorobabel et in diebus Nehemiæ, dabant partes cantoribus et janitoribus per dies singulos, et sanctificabant Levitas, et Levitæ sanctificabant filios Aaron.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵל֩ בִּימֵ֨י זְרֻבָּבֶ֜ל וּבִימֵ֣י נְחֶמְיָ֗ה נֹ֥תְנִ֛ים מְנָי֛וֹת הַמְשֹׁרְרִ֥ים וְהַשֹּׁעֲרִ֖ים דְּבַר־י֣וֹם בְּיוֹמ֑וֹ וּמַקְדִּשִׁים֙ לַלְוִיִּ֔ם וְהַ֨לְוִיִּ֔ם מַקְדִּשִׁ֖ים לִבְנֵ֥י אַהֲרֹֽן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And all Israel, in the days of Zorobabel, and in the days of Nehemiah gave portions to the singing men, and to the porters, day by day, and they sanctified the Levites, and the Levites sanctified the sons of Aaron.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta koko Israel antoi veisaajille ja ovenvartioille osan, Serubbabelin ja Nehemian aikana, joka päivä heidän osansa; ja pyhittivät sen Leviläisille, ja Leviläiset pyhittivät Aaronin lapsille.
verses.king_james: And all Israel in the days of Zerubbabel, and in the days of Nehemiah, gave the portions of the singers and the porters, every day his portion: and they sanctified holy things unto the Levites; and the Levites sanctified them unto the children of Aaron.
